summary: Completed iteration 11 testing for 5 new features: 1) Date field in edit appointment dialog, 2) Past time slot filtering on today, 3) Dashboard Uscite/Promozioni buttons, 4) Auto-apply promos at checkout, 5) Auto-select prepaid cards at checkout. All 14 backend API tests passed. All 5 main features verified working on frontend.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Testing used existing appointments and promotions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features for iteration 11 are working. PlanningPage.jsx has getAvailableTimeSlots() helper at line 46 that filters past slots. Edit dialog has 3-column grid with Date/Time/Operator at lines 1360-1415. Dashboard MODULES array at lines 18-36 includes Uscite and Promozioni. INCASSA button at lines 1479-1506 auto-loads promos and auto-selects prepaid cards.

Feature_1_Date_in_Edit_Dialog.details: Edit appointment dialog shows Data (date input), Orario (time select), Operatore (operator select) in 3-column grid. Date is pre-filled with appointment's current date (e.g., 2026-02-28).

Feature_2_Past_Time_Slots_Planning.details: When creating new appointment on today's date, only time slots from current time onwards are shown. Tested at 17:xx, showed slots starting at 17:30.

Feature_2b_Past_Time_Slots_BookingPage.details: Public /prenota booking page correctly filters past time slots for today. Shows only future slots (17:30+).

Feature_2c_Past_Time_Slots_WebsitePage.details: Public /sito website booking form correctly filters past time slots for today. Shows only future slots.

Feature_3_Dashboard_Buttons.details: Dashboard page shows Uscite (Registro spese) and Promozioni (Offerte e promo) buttons in the Moduli grid.

Feature_4_Auto_Apply_Promos.details: When clicking INCASSA button, eligible promotions are loaded and the first promo is auto-selected. Promozioni Disponibili section shows all applicable promos.

Feature_5_Auto_Select_Prepaid_Cards.details: Code correctly checks for client's prepaid cards on INCASSA click. If active card with remaining_value > 0 exists, auto-switches to 'prepaid' payment and selects the card. Test client didn't have prepaid card to fully verify UI.

Regression_Login.details: Login with melitobruno@gmail.com / password123 works correctly.

Regression_Planning_Page.details: Planning page loads correctly with time grid and operator columns.

screenshots_captured: .screenshots/dashboard_modules.png - Dashboard with Uscite and Promozioni buttons
.screenshots/new_apt_dialog_today.png - New appointment dialog with filtered time slots
.screenshots/booking_step2.png - Public booking with filtered time slots
